testName: Load dashboard, navigate to skill, play video

fix.summary: Don't assert .should('be.visible') on a mux-player web component (shadow DOM + lazy mount makes Cypress visibility checks unreliable). Use wrapper-scoped existence + currentTime polling, matching the existing verifyVideoProgress contract.
fix.pattern: Inside verifyVideoProgress: resolveVideoWrapperOrLegacyIndex(options).find('mux-player', { timeout: 30000 }).should('exist'). Then poll currentTime via cy.then(...) with cy.wait(interval, { log: false }) until delta >= expectedSeconds. Pass wrapperAlias or videoIndex from the spec; never rely on a global mux-player or be.visible.

investigationFindings: Commit 660e00dcd removed unreliable .should('be.visible') from verifyVideoProgress. 4e9b9ed48 / 9da90a6be stabilized catalog skill load by switching to wrapper-scoped mux + scroll fixes.
rootCauseChain: ELEMENT_VISIBILITY -> visibility check on shadow-DOM custom element + lazy mount -> false negative -> assertion fails on otherwise-playing video
